rawResponse.content:
{
  "text": "Due to insufficient emotion analysis data, no specific retention improvements can be recommended. Next steps include collecting chunk-level emotion metrics and viewer engagement data to enable actionable insights.",
  "reasoning": "The provided metrics summary has empty averages, trends, and peak moments, with a friction index of zero, indicating no analysis was performed. Chunk summaries are also empty, so there is no evidence of emotional beats or viewer friction points. Without data on hook effectiveness, pacing, or emotional peaks, it is impossible to identify retention issues or opportunities. This lack of data prevents any concrete recommendations for edits.",
  "confidence": 0.1,
  "keyFindings": [
    "No emotion analysis data available in chunk summaries",
    "Metrics summary is completely empty with no averages or trends",
    "Friction index is zero, suggesting no viewer engagement analysis",
    "Peak moments are not identified, missing emotional high points"
  ],
  "suggestions": [
    "Run the emotion analysis pipeline to generate chunk-level data",
    "Collect viewer retention metrics like drop-off rates and watch time",
    "Analyze the video for emotional peaks and valleys using the data",
    "Review the hook and pacing based on actual engagement trends",
    "Conduct A/B testing with different edits to measure impact",
    "Gather feedback on emotional beats from target audience",
    "Use the data to identify friction points and smooth transitions",
    "Optimize content length based on retention patterns"
  ]
}
